description.en: The accuracy of the compass means that the deviation is positive or negative. It's usually 10.

excerpt.es: The accuracy of the compass means that the deviation is positive or negative. It's usually 10.
excerpt.en: The accuracy of the compass means that the deviation is positive or negative. It's usually 10.

description.en: A number represents the difference between the motion of the device around the z axis of the world system and the direction of the north, express in degrees with values ranging from 0 to 360.
